creator: joe@pavilion.net
text:
The CVSup port is dependant upon the modula 3 system.
	It appears that you cannot build modula-3-lib on a non-X11
	system because it is dependent upon libXaw.

	The CVSup port has a build time option to disable the gui
	functionality, but this doesn't help if you can't build the
	mod3 libraries to link it to.

Fix: 

Run the staticly compiled version from hub.freebsd.org/pub/CVSup

	This isn't in my opinion a good solution for such a core system.
